kw.name: Create Session
kw.msg: Creating Session using : alias=api, url=http://localhost:3000, headers={}, cookies={}, auth=None, timeout=None, proxies=None, verify=False, debug=0
kw.doc: Create Session: create a HTTP session to a server

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api path_url=/api headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive'} body=None

GET Response : url=http://localhost:3000/api status=200, reason=OK headers={'X-Powered-By': 'Express', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Content-Type': 'text/html; charset=utf-8', 'Content-Length': '70', 'ETag': 'W/"46-9y1NgOWgaNbbB0fH/4yja9F4AI8"', 'Date': 'Sun, 26 Apr 2026 15:59:22 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Keep-Alive': 'timeout=5'} body=Hegen terveyspäiväkirjasovelluksenAPI täällä ja päällä. Terve!
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/users/login path_url=/api/users/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '48', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"username": "hege3001", "password": "hege3001"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.

kw.name: Dictionary Should Contain Key
kw.doc: Fails if ``key`` is not found from ``dictionary``.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: POST On Session
kw.msg: POST Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/users/login path_url=/api/users/login headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Content-Length': '48', 'Content-Type': 'application/json'} body=b'{"username": "hege3001", "password": "hege3001"}'
kw.doc: Sends a POST request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Create Dictionary
kw.doc: Creates and returns a dictionary based on the given ``items``.

kw.name: GET On Session
kw.msg: GET Request : url=http://localhost:3000/api/entries path_url=/api/entries headers={'User-Agent': 'python-requests/2.33.1', 'Accept-Encoding': 'gzip, deflate, zstd', 'Accept': '*/*', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Authorization': 'Bearer eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo1LCJ1c2VybmFtZSI6ImhlZ2UzMDAxIiwiZW1haWwiOiJ0ZXN0M0BnbWFpbC5jb20iLCJjcmVhdGVkX2F0IjoiMjAyNi0wNC0yNlQxMjo1Mzo0OC4wMDBaIiwidXNlcl9sZXZlbCI6InJlZ3VsYXIiLCJpYXQiOjE3NzcyMTkxNjIsImV4cCI6MTc3NzMwNTU2Mn0.PDjnqwdVWZDFGnEccjMRvcjBLBpoWd4paqvsZ_7LpEk'} body=None

GET Response : url=http://localhost:3000/api/entries status=200, reason=OK headers={'X-Powered-By': 'Express', 'Access-Control-Allow-Origin': '*', 'Content-Type': 'application/json; charset=utf-8', 'Content-Length': '595', 'ETag': 'W/"253-0oVbuvk5dX9KyR4e4rc01lGF5X0"', 'Date': 'Sun, 26 Apr 2026 15:59:22 GMT', 'Connection': 'keep-alive', 'Keep-Alive': 'timeout=5'} body=[{"entry_id":6,"user_id":5,"entry_date":"2026-04-25T21:00:00.000Z","mood":"iloinen","weight":"70.00","sleep_hours":8,"notes":"Robotti testasi päiväkirjaa!","created_at":"2026-04-26T13:21:29.000Z"},{"entry_id":7,"user_id":5,"entry_date":"2026-04-25T21:00:00.000Z","mood":"iloinen","weight":"70.00","sleep_hours":8,"notes":"Robotti testasi päiväkirjaa!","created_at":"2026-04-26T13:23:20.000Z"},{"entry_id":8,"user_id":5,"entry_date":"2026-04-25T21:00:00.000Z","mood":"iloinen","weight":"70.00","sleep_hours":8,"notes":"Robotti testasi päiväkirjaa!","created_at":"2026-04-26T13:35:23.000Z"}]
kw.doc: Sends a GET request on a previously created HTTP Session.

kw.name: Status Should Be
kw.doc: Fails if response status code is different than the expected.
